arts.ttl: Arsenal & Liverpool contact £48m star’s camp, Chelsea also among transfer suitors
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool have reportedly both contacted Nico Williams’ camp as they pursue a transfer move for the Athletic Bilbao winger. The Spain international looks likely to be a man in demand this summer as Chelsea, Newcastle and Aston Villa are also keen on bringing him to the Premier League. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal make contact over Man Utd transfer target with 23 G/A in 22 games this season
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are both among the clubs showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Atalanta striker Mateo Retegui ahead of this summer. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Arsenal have already had some contact with Atalanta over a potential deal for the in-form Italy international. arts.ttl: What Mikel Arteta was doing during Everton vs Liverpool as fresh Arsenal title admission made
arts.sum: Any time they are not also in action, Arteta and his players will likely be keeping a close eye on Liverpool games, however the Gunners boss was unable to watch Tarkowski's winner. Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has hinted at what he was doing when Everton scored a last-gasp equaliser against Liverpool.
